pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.2.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE (jakarta.*) instead of Java EE (javax.*). Code using javax.annotation will fail to compile or link at runtime without this migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Spring Boot 3.x Jakarta EE migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for javax.* packages. Using javax.annotation will result in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the code imports javax.annotation.PostConstruct etc.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target levels from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: To utilize Java 21 features and ensure the bytecode is compatible with the target JDK 21 runtime.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/api/ApiSe.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the LocalFileRAG class.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/api/contr.general_idea: Update import path for LocalFileRAG to reflect its new package location in the service layer.
src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/api/contr.why_exists: Class not found compile error because the class was moved to a different package.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/api/contr.general_idea: Update import path to reflect the relocation of the LocalFileRAG class into a service package.
src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/api/contr.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class LocalFileRAG in the old package path.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/api/contr.general_idea: Update import path for LocalFileRAG to reflect its new package location in the service layer.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the LocalFileRAG class.
src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.why_exists: Class not found compile error because the class was moved to a sub-package.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Update import for LocalFileRAG to reflect its new package location in the service module.
src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.why_exists: Class not found compile error because the class was moved to a different package.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Migrate Java EE annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.why_exists: Class not found compile error because javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3/JDK 17+).
